messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "445ab45d-436d-4d0c-8dc6-23e7bd545e6a", "article_id": "5957ddfc-fac9-429a-ba74-578ce4049fa3", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "celebrity_endorsement", "brand": "Louis Vuitton", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["冬奧滑冰金牌劉美賢 Alysa Liu", "首次參加時裝大秀的冬奧滑冰金牌劉美賢 Alysa Liu"], "anchor_json": {"endorsement_type": "organic_product_placement", "event_context": "Louis Vuitton 2026秋冬大秀", "debut_note": "首次參加時裝大秀", "brand": "Louis Vuitton"}}, {"event_frame_id": "a96014cf-0ccd-45e2-90e5-ef8008457f4e", "article_id": "5957ddfc-fac9-429a-ba74-578ce4049fa3", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "celebrity_endorsement", "brand": "Louis Vuitton", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["品牌大使 Felix", "精靈王子，LV品牌大使Stray Kids成員Felix這次以看秀嘉賓身分出席巴黎時裝週"], "anchor_json": {"endorsement_type": "organic_product_placement", "event_context": "Louis Vuitton 2026秋冬大秀", "brand": "Louis Vuitton"}}, {"event_frame_id": "efaa414e-732d-4a75-a3fa-7c068771f500", "article_id": "5957ddfc-fac9-429a-ba74-578ce4049fa3", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "product_launch", "brand": "Louis Vuitton", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["這款 Louis Vuitton Squire East-West，更是近期許多人心中的「想要清單」首選", "Squire East-West的靈感，其實可以追溯到品牌歷史中的一個經典原型"], "anchor_json": {"event_context": "Paris Fashion Week 2026", "trend_alignment": "East-West bag trend", "brand": "Louis Vuitton"}}]}
